description: Style NoteWhat could make you look better than a nice pair of heels while wearing a dress or a skirt? In fact, people wear heels even with jeans and it looks amazing. A nice pair of stilettos from catwalk is just what you need.Heel: 4.2& rdquo Product DetailsBlunt toed stiletto heels and a silver footbedA transparent mesh at the forefoot with crystal embellishmentsTPU outsole and heel patch with pattern grovesMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
